top_signals.title: Stocks Decline as US-Iran Clashes Drive Oil Higher: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A renewed advance in oil sent stocks lower as bond yields rose on concern that an escalation of hostilities between the US and Iran will hinder prospects for a peace deal, with elevated energy costs fueling inflation risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed’s Beige Book highlights weak consumer and reliance on AI build-out
top_signals.summary: Middle-income households are under increasing pressure as inflation rises
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Santander, JPMorgan to Back $1 Billion TGS Vaca Muerta Financing
top_signals.summary: Citigroup, Banco Santander SA and JP Morgan are among lenders working on a roughly $1 billion finance package for a project by Transportadora de Gas del Sur SA in Argentina’s Vaca Muerta shale formation, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: Partners Group limits withdrawals at private equity fund for wealthy individuals
top_signals.summary: Swiss private capital firm caps redemptions from its $8.6bn flagship vehicle
